improvement: Added an independent fail-closed verifier for retained Cloudflare hostname-authority consistency artifacts.
finding: A materialized consistency verdict must be independently checked before later workflow stages may inherit its deployment-claim permission.

verification.environment: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed source content
covered: valid retained artifact accepted with deployment-identity-only claim ceiling
rejected verdict cannot retain deployment claim permission
hostname and deployment URL disagreement rejected

deployment.reason: C-001 remains blocked on Cloudflare credentials and no provider-returned deployment identity was available.

claim_ceiling: Committed source behavior and deterministic verifier tests only; no deployment, DNS availability, served-byte, medical, or scientific claim.
rollback: Revert commits 8d60cbcbf38b0e6efdb278b30433b06249281a16 and 2c5c2ed859e752fd6cd63df3d28491a3c08b65ad; no deployment or schema migration occurred.
